prompt: Risk premium proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Call controls risk when survival pressure does not require a fold or raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits the tournament cue set, so the line preserves equity without risking more than this pressure read can justify.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Calling works better when risk premium is real but your hand still realizes enough equity to continue without forcing a thin stack-off. This is a controlled continue that protects tournament life better than turning a marginal edge into an oversized commitment.
